bridge_equation_v19.plasticity_term: B_plastic_v19 = mean(B_plastic_v18, L_prop_scale, 1 - P_prop_scale, D_feature_v13, 1 - G_brain_v13)
bridge_equation_v19.structure_term: B_struct_v19 = mean(B_struct_v18, S_prop_scale, R_prop_scale, 1 - P_prop_scale, D_structure_v13)
bridge_equation_v19.readiness_term: R_train_v19 = mean(R_train_v18, B_plastic_v19, B_struct_v19, R_scale, D_align_v13, 1 - P_prop_scale)

project_readout.summary: 训练终式第十九桥开始直接吸收更大系统传播结果，检验平台期松动能否终于传导成训练规则层的收口。
project_readout.next_question: 下一步要把第十九桥并回主核，检验平台期传播是否开始形成跨层级突破。
